spec.name: A Stairway
spec.description: You stand now at the base of the uneven stairway. The walls, floor, and ceiling of this small landing are covered with strange hieroglyphics.

south.description: You see a seam in the stone wall.

up.description: It is too dark to see up the stairway.

extra_descs.description: The hieroglyphics are covered with a thick layer of dust. You clear the dust away with your hand, and find that you cannot comprehend them.
